function.name: grep
function.description:
Recursively search files for a regex pattern using ripgrep (rg) or grep. Respects .gitignore and .codeignore files by default when using ripgrep.

Parameters:
  pattern (REQUIRED, string): 
  path (optional, string): 
  max_matches (optional, any): Override the default maximum number of matches.
  use_default_ignore (optional, boolean): Whether to respect .gitignore and .ignore files.

Example call: grep({"pattern": "..."})
You MUST provide all REQUIRED parameters as a JSON object.

max_matches.description: Override the default maximum number of matches.
max_matches.title: Max Matches

function.name: read_file
function.description:
Read local files with line-based paging. Text files are returned directly, PDFs are extracted to text, and supported images return metadata summaries.

Parameters:
  path (REQUIRED, string): 
  offset (optional, integer): Line number to start reading from (0-indexed, inclusive).
  limit (optional, any): Maximum number of lines to read.

Example call: read_file({"path": "..."})
You MUST provide all REQUIRED parameters as a JSON object.

offset.title: Offset

limit.description: Maximum number of lines to read.
limit.title: Limit

function.name: task
function.description:
Delegate a task to a subagent for independent execution. Useful for exploration, research, or parallel work that doesn't require user interaction. The subagent runs in-memory and saves interaction logs.

Parameters:
  task (REQUIRED, string): The task to delegate to the subagent
  agent (optional, string): Name of the agent profile to use (must be a subagent)

Example call: task({"task": "..."})
You MUST provide all REQUIRED parameters as a JSON object.

task.description: The task to delegate to the subagent
task.title: Task

agent.description: Name of the agent profile to use (must be a subagent)
